Key Skills: Recall products of single-digit numbers (1x1 to 6x9); Solve basic multiplication problems
Recall products of single-digit numbers (7x1 to 12x12); Solve basic multiplication problems

Key Skills: Define and apply a × b = b × a; Reorder numbers in multiplication problems

Key Skills: Define and apply (a × b) × c = a × (b × c); Regroup numbers in multiplication problems

Key Skills: Define and apply a × (b - c) = (a × b) - (a × c); Expand expressions
